isc.criterion: Exports groupBy(items, keyFn) returning a record of arrays keyed by keyFn
Returns an empty object for an empty input array
isc.evidence: group-by.ts: empty loop yields {}; correct by construction

isc.criterion: Guards against a null/undefined items argument
isc.evidence: group-by.ts: `for (const it of items)` throws if items is null/undefined

isc.criterion: Tests cover normal grouping and the empty-array case
isc.evidence: group-by.test.ts only tests grouping; no empty-array test

summary: Core grouping is fine but the null guard and half the required tests are missing. Borderline weak.
